title: Linvoseltamab in Patients With Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma in the LINKER-MM1 Study: Longer Follow-Up and Subgroup Analyses.
abstract: Linvoseltamab, a BCMA × CD3 bispecific antibody, demonstrated durable efficacy and generally manageable safety in patients with relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma (RRMM) in the LINKER-MM1 study (NCT03761108).
